reason: The A2-v1 contract passed its cue observability audit for seeds 5106 and 5107 but failed it for a later frozen seed before the batch completed. The confirmation runner did not preflight all frozen contract seeds before creating result directories.
interpretation: Retained only for debugging and provenance. These artifacts must not be pooled, reported, or interpreted as an M2 confirmation result.
replacement: A2-v2 uses seed-stable anchored raw cues. It requires a new M2-v2 development run, event-pre ablation, and a preflighted confirmation.
